title: Legend's Creator Essentials
description: Essentials for any youtuber or content creator looking to improve performance, visuals, and cinematics
body:
| Fabric             | 1.20.4               |
|---------------------|:---------------------:|

![The Logo Of Legend's Creator Essentials](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/aZBCmWEa/images/6e662151c6e0a7ba76a4c8ab4cdcf2b84ba05014.png)

**Essentials for any youtuber or content creator looking to improve performance, visuals, and cinematics**

# Features
**VISUALS**

This modpack mainly focuses on its visuals adding new particle effects, player and mob animations, connected textures, togglable bushy leaves with the texture pack, better clouds, full bright toggles and SO MUCH MORE. Don't forget UI improvements to the achievements and statistics screens

**PERFORMANCE**

This modpack uses the best of the best modern performance mods such as well known Sodium, Iris, etc. These will help your fps, especially when running multiple programs at once. I made sure that none of these performance mods compromised the look of the world in any way.

**CINEMATICS**

The modpack also attempted to add as many creator-geared mods as possible. This includes replay mod (GREAT for timelapses), camera utils to allow you to detach your camera from your player, change your f5 distance and a lot more. I also included some sound improvments.

![The minecraft overwold with a village](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/aZBCmWEa/images/99ca444f068004645d050d9d9d46f7df24a9ff47.png)
